execution_mode: isolated pytest batches to prevent legacy Streamlit/import state leakage

batches.scope: projection, advanced reliability, canonical runtime, causal end-to-end
delivery, synchronization, external architecture, connectors, full metric, history
Lunch search, multiscale, one-click, performance, Power BI
regime trust, research validation, wait policy, settings, Similar-Day
Cloud preflight, sync/mobile/NLP/AI, ten-paper calibration and shadow layers
trust history, UI restoration, requirements, Windows compatibility

note: The monolithic single-process pytest invocation reached approximately three quarters with no failures before the execution environment timed it out. All 32 files then completed successfully in isolated fresh processes.
